mapper.select: SELECT item_id, external_item_no, title, artist_id, artist_name, album_id, album_name, genre_code, language_code, duration_seconds, release_date, item_status, created_at, updated_at FROM items WHERE item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT item_id, external_item_no, title, artist_id, artist_name, album_id, album_name, genre_code, language_code, duration_seconds, release_date, item_status, created_at, updated_at FROM items WHERE external_item_no = #{externalItemNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT item_id, external_item_no, title, artist_id, artist_name, album_id, album_name, genre_code, language_code, duration_seconds, release_date, item_status, created_at, updated_at FROM items WHERE title = #{title} AND artist_name = #{artistName} AND title NOT LIKE '绀轰緥姝屾洸%' ORDER BY item_id LIMIT 1
